description: A quality auditor verifies that all employees in a manufacturing role have completed their required QMS training.

nodes.task_description: Obtain a list of all employees in manufacturing roles.

expected_outcome.value: The auditor has the list of in-scope employees.

nodes.task_description: Obtain the training records for the 'Good Manufacturing Practices (GMP)' course from the LMS.

expected_outcome.value: The auditor has the training completion data.

nodes.task_description: Compare the two lists to identify any employees who have not completed the mandatory training.

expected_outcome.value: The comparison identifies 5 employees who are delinquent on their training.
